title: Projects/SubDAOs cards: remove TMU-Notes-WST and add TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes first

requirements.summary: Remove the "TMU-Notes-WST" project card from the Projects/SubDAOs page by deleting its staticProjects entry.
acceptanceCriteria: The "TMU-Notes-WST" card is not rendered anywhere on the Projects/SubDAOs page.
No other existing project cards are removed or reordered (except as needed to insert the new first card in REQ-4).

file_operations.description: Delete the staticProjects list item whose name is "TMU-Notes-WST" so it is no longer included in the rendered project grid, without changing any other cards or page styling.

requirements.summary: Add a new first-position project card "TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes" with the provided multi-line/bulleted description and a "Watch Video" button opening the YouTube link in a new tab.
acceptanceCriteria: A new card titled "TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes" appears as the first card in the grid (before "Morshid").
The new card displays the provided description text with bullets visible/readable.
The card includes a button labeled exactly "Watch Video".
Clicking "Watch Video" opens https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pk2TtlglNno in a new browser tab/window (target="_blank" with rel="noopener noreferrer").
No other page content, card styling, hover behavior, or existing buttons/links are changed.

file_operations.description: Insert a new Project object as the FIRST item in staticProjects (before "Morshid") with name "TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes", description text exactly as provided (including line breaks and bullet lines), websiteUrl set to https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pk2TtlglNno, and customButtonText set to "Watch Video" so the existing button rendering pattern is used and opens in a new tab with rel="noopener noreferrer".

Update renderDescription to add a minimal, name-based special-case for "TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes" so that single-newline bullet lines render as readable bullets (similar in spirit to the existing "Social Edification" special-case), without changing formatting behavior for any other project card.
